# PF & Co Construction
> AI-powered site intelligence and planning reports across England and Wales. 24 report types. 60 data sources. 48-hour turnaround. Subscribe from £399/mo.

## About
PF & Co Construction delivers AI-powered site intelligence and planning reports across England and Wales. Our multi-agent AI system (112 specialised agents) interrogates 60 authoritative data sources across 11 constraint categories to produce planning-ready reports in 48 hours. Fixed pricing, 48-hour turnaround, human-verified, RICS AI Standard aligned.

## Services

### Site Intelligence (Primary Service)
Planning-ready reports for any UK site. 24 report types across 6 categories. Buy individually, as a bundle, or subscribe.

**Core Intelligence:**
- Site Acquisition Report — GDV, RLV, planning risk, go/no-go recommendation (£995)
- Development Finance Summary — Viability screening, profit on cost, sensitivity analysis (£795)
- Site Feasibility Report — 22+ constraint screening, Planning Friction Score (£595)
- Geotechnical Desk Study — BGS geology, contamination, foundation risk (£495)
- Flood Risk Assessment — 7 flood sources, Decision Risk Scores (£375)
- Phase 1 Desk Study — Preliminary risk assessment per BS 10175 / LCRM 2020 (£595)

**Planning & Strategy:**
- Planning Statement — Policy evidence and planning justification (£495)
- Pre-Application Advice — LPA pre-submission enquiry pack (£245)
- Design & Access Statement — Design rationale and accessibility (£395)
- Feasibility Study — GDV, cost appraisal, viability (£795)
- CIL Liability Assessment — Levy exposure, exemptions, relief (£295)

**Environmental & Ecology:**
- Biodiversity Net Gain Screening — BNG applicability, 10% metric (£495)
- Energy Statement — Part L, SAP, MEES, carbon analysis (£445)
- Air Quality Screening Assessment — IAQM/EPUK screening (£395)

**Specialist Surveys:**
- Heritage Impact Assessment — Listed buildings, conservation areas (£545)
- Transport Statement — Trip generation, highways, accessibility (£495)
- Parking Survey — Evidence-based parking demand (£345)
- Arboricultural Constraints Appraisal — Desktop TPO register, LiDAR canopy, RPA mapping (£575)
- Noise Screening Report — Desktop BS 4142/BS 8233/ProPG screening (£445)
- Daylight & Sunlight Screening — BRE 209 screening with risk indicators (£595)

**Construction Readiness:**
- Construction Management Plan — Pre-commencement CMP condition (£595)
- Pre-Construction Design Review — 95-check design coordination review (£895)

**Compliance & Legal (project-dependent):**
- Building Control — Part A structural calculations (contact for quote)
- Party Wall Assessment — Engineering-led party wall assessment (contact for quote)

All prices exclude VAT.
URL: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/site-intelligence
Order: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/order-report

### Subscriptions
Site intelligence report subscriptions. 1 credit = 1 report of any type. Fixed monthly cost, 48-hour turnaround.
- Scout: £399/mo — 2 reports/month, 72hr turnaround, for land buyers and deal packagers
- Professional: £995/mo — 6 reports/month, 48hr turnaround, white-label, for architects and consultants
- Developer: £1,995/mo — 12 reports/month, 48hr turnaround, white-label, for SME developers
- Enterprise: £3,995/mo — 30 reports/month, 48hr turnaround, white-label, for volume housebuilders
Annual billing available (15% discount). 30-day money-back guarantee.
URL: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/subscriptions

### Report Bundles
Pre-construction diligence bundles at additional savings:
- The Complete Intelligence (22 reports): £6,995 — Save 68% vs RRP
- The Developer Due Diligence (7 reports): £2,995 — Save 68% vs RRP
- The Full Planning Suite (7 reports): £2,495 — Save 66% vs RRP
- The Self-Build Starter (4 reports): £1,495 — Save 73% vs RRP
- The Conversion Ready Pack (4 reports): £1,495 — Save 70% vs RRP
- The Architect Support Pack (4 reports): £1,395 — Save 70% vs RRP
- The Appeal-Ready Pack (4 reports): £1,195 — Save 73% vs RRP
- The Construction Readiness Pack (2 reports): £1,095 — Save 56% vs RRP
- The Triple Threat (3 reports): £995 — Save 78% vs RRP
URL: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/report-packages

### Structural Engineering
Residential and commercial structural design, beam calculations, basement impact assessments, and load-bearing wall removals.
URL: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/structural-engineering

### Construction
Engineering-led construction services including structural alterations, extensions, loft conversions, and basement builds.
URL: https://www.pfandco.co.uk/construction
